evals.prompt: 梳理需求：监管节点查询日志时必须实时向园区节点拉取，园区节点再向企业节点拉取；这是需求，不要改成本地汇总。
evals.expected_output: Preserve pull semantics and treat implementation risks as planning concerns.
assertions: Treats real-time pull as requirement semantics.
Does not recommend local summary as replacement.
Records timeout/pagination/partial failure as planning concerns.

evals.prompt: 梳理一个跨多个下级节点拉取日志的需求。
evals.expected_output: Default to partial results with failed nodes marked, not as a blocking question.
assertions: Does not ask whether the whole page should fail as a blocker.
Records partial results with failed node marking as a default assumption.
Asks only high-level product semantic questions.
